Scenario.overview: Communications Simple The Frankenstein group targets communication companies with expert-level attacks, utilizing spear-phishing and PowerShell scripts to gain access and exfiltrate sensitive data.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Domain Name Registrar, Network Traffic, Command
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: General Access Method, PowerShell Script, Command Execution (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers send targeted phishing emails to communication company employees using compromised email accounts.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attackers utilize PowerShell Empire to gain remote access to the target's network.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attackers use WMI to execute malicious code on the target's system.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-24: Filter Failure through Buffer Overflow
stage.description: The attackers steal sensitive communication data from the target's network.

Scenario.summary: The Frankenstein group uses spear-phishing and PowerShell scripts to gain access to communication companies and exfiltrate sensitive data.
